hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=(j.tool_input&&j.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(f))console.log(f);}catch(e){}});" | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ]; then ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false npx eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi; } || true
